auth.label: JWT
auth.description: Rentman JWT used as a bearer token. Generate it in Rentman under Configuration > Integrations; the latest generated token is the only valid token: https://api.rentman.net/.

actions.name: get_contact
actions.description: Get a Rentman contact by numeric ID.

id.description: The numeric Rentman item ID to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Path parameters for retrieving a Rentman item.

actions.name: get_contact_person
actions.description: Get a Rentman contact person by numeric ID.

id.description: The numeric Rentman item ID to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Path parameters for retrieving a Rentman item.

actions.name: get_equipment
actions.description: Get a Rentman equipment item by numeric ID.

id.description: The numeric Rentman item ID to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Path parameters for retrieving a Rentman item.

actions.name: get_project
actions.description: Get a Rentman project by numeric ID.

id.description: The numeric Rentman item ID to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Path parameters for retrieving a Rentman item.

actions.name: list_contact_persons
actions.description: List Rentman contact persons with optional fields, sorting, pagination, expansion, and filters.

fields.description: Comma-separated Rentman field names to include in each item.

sort.description: Comma-separated Rentman sort fields, such as +id or -displayname.

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return. Rentman allows 1 to 1500.

offset.description: Number of items to skip when using offset-based pagination.

cursor.description: Opaque Rentman cursor token from a previous page URL.

expand.description: Comma-separated linked fields to expand, using Rentman's expand syntax.

additionalProperties.description: The Rentman filter value to send for this query parameter.

filters.description: Additional Rentman filter query parameters. Keys may include operators such as distance[lte].

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Rentman items.

items.description: Rentman items returned by the collection endpoint.

itemCount.description: The number of items in this response.

limit.description: The maximum number of items requested or returned.

offset.description: The number of items skipped in this response.

anyOf.description: The full Rentman next page URL, or null when no next page is available.
